2026-04-23T08:50:26.1295792Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. 2026-04-23T08:57:19.7465256Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T08:56:47.655798507Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Documentation Gap\n\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm`\n**Service directory:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/`\n**Triggered by:** commit 360612179 (#58563) by @azure-sdk\n\n## What Changed\n\nA new management-plane SDK for Microsoft Defender External Attack Surface Management (Defender EASM) was added. The package ships two resource types (`EasmWorkspaceResource` and `EasmLabelResource`) and a README was created with placeholder content. This is the first public release (1.0.0-beta.4).\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **Examples section is empty of real code** — only a generic link to `https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` with no EASM-specific code snippets\n- **Key concepts section is generic** — only links to general Azure SDK docs; no description of what Workspaces, Labels, or Tasks are in the context of the EASM service\n- **Authenticate the client has no code sample** — just links to a quickstart guide, no inline `DefaultAzureCredential` + `ArmClient` snippet\n- **No `tests/Samples/` directory** — there are auto-generated samples in `tests/Generated/Samples/`, but no hand-authored snippet-backed samples that can be injected into the README via `Update-Snippets.ps1`\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify README.md\n\n**File:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/README.md`\n**Action:** Edit\n\nReplace the current `## Key concepts`, `## Documentation`, and `## Examples` sections with the content below. The `## Documentation` section is non-standard and should be merged into the other sections.\n\nReplace the section from `## Key concepts` through the end of `## Examples` with:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\n**Workspaces** are the top-level container for Defender EASM data. Each workspace is scoped to a subscription and resource group, and contains the discovered attack surface assets and associated metadata for your organization. Use `EasmWorkspaceResource` to create, read, update, and delete workspaces.\n\n**Labels** are user-defined tags that can be applied to discovered assets within a workspace to organize and filter them. Use `EasmLabelResource` and `EasmLabelCollection` to manage labels within a workspace.\n\n**Tasks** represent long-running operations within a workspace (for example, running a discovery run). Use `GetTaskByWorkspace` on `EasmWorkspaceResource` to poll the status of an ongoing task.\n\n### Thread safety\n\nAll client instance methods are thread-safe and independent of each other ([more details](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html#dotnet-service-methods-thread-safety)).\n\n### Additional concepts\n\n[Client options](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#configuring-service-clients-using-clientoptions) |\n[Accessing the response](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#accessing-http-response-details-using-responset) |\n[Long-running operations](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#consuming-long-running-operations-using-operationt) |\n[Handling failures](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#reporting-errors-requestfailedexception) |\n[Diagnostics](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#logging) |\n[Mocking](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/sdk/unit-testing-mocking) |\n[Client lifetime](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/azure-sdk/lifetime-management-and-thread-safety-guarantees-of-azure-sdk-net-clients/)\n\n## Examples\n\n### Authenticate the client and get the workspace collection\n\n```C# Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_AuthenticateAndGetCollection\nTokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\nstring subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\nstring resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\nResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\nResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\n\nEasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\n```\n\n### Create or update a workspace\n\n```C# Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_CreateWorkspace\nEasmWorkspaceData data = new EasmWorkspaceData(new AzureLocation(\"eastus\"));\nArmOperation\u003cEasmWorkspaceResource\u003e lro = await workspaces.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \"my-easm-workspace\", data);\nEasmWorkspaceResource workspace = lro.Value;\nConsole.WriteLine($\"Created workspace: {workspace.Data.Name}\");\n```\n\n### List all workspaces in a resource group\n\n```C# Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_ListWorkspaces\nawait foreach (EasmWorkspaceResource workspace in workspaces.GetAllAsync())\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"Workspace: {workspace.Data.Name} in {workspace.Data.Location}\");\n}\n```\n\n### Create a label\n\n```C# Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_CreateLabel\nEasmLabelCollection labels = workspace.GetEasmLabels();\nEasmLabelData labelData = new EasmLabelData();\nArmOperation\u003cEasmLabelResource\u003e labelLro = await labels.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \"my-label\", labelData);\nEasmLabelResource label = labelLro.Value;\nConsole.WriteLine($\"Created label: {label.Data.Name}\");\n```\n\nFor more code examples, see [Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm samples](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/tests/Generated/Samples).\n```\n\nAlso update the `### Authenticate the Client` section (under Getting started) to add a code sample:\n\n```markdown\n### Authenticate the Client\n\nTo create an authenticated client and start interacting with Microsoft Azure resources, see the [quickstart guide here](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/doc/dev/mgmt_quickstart.md).\n\n```C# Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_Authenticate\nTokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n```\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add snippet-backed sample tests\n\n**File:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/tests/Samples/Sample_DefenderEasm.cs`\n**Action:** Create\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Core;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample_DefenderEasm : SamplesBase\u003cDefenderEasmManagementTestEnvironment\u003e\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task Sample_Authenticate()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_Authenticate\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task Sample_AuthenticateAndGetCollection()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_AuthenticateAndGetCollection\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\n\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task Sample_CreateWorkspace()\n        {\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\", \"dummyrg\");\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\n\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_CreateWorkspace\n            EasmWorkspaceData data = new EasmWorkspaceData(new AzureLocation(\"eastus\"));\n            ArmOperation\u003cEasmWorkspaceResource\u003e lro = await workspaces.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \"my-easm-workspace\", data);\n            EasmWorkspaceResource workspace = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created workspace: {workspace.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task Sample_ListWorkspaces()\n        {\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\", \"dummyrg\");\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\n\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_ListWorkspaces\n            await foreach (EasmWorkspaceResource workspace in workspaces.GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Workspace: {workspace.Data.Name} in {workspace.Data.Location}\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task Sample_CreateLabel()\n        {\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\", \"dummyrg\");\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\n            EasmWorkspaceResource workspace = await workspaces.GetAsync(\"my-easm-workspace\");\n\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_CreateLabel\n            EasmLabelCollection labels = workspace.GetEasmLabels();\n            EasmLabelData labelData = new EasmLabelData();\n            ArmOperation\u003cEasmLabelResource\u003e labelLro = await labels.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \"my-label\", labelData);\n            EasmLabelResource label = labelLro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created label: {label.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n\u003e **Note:** Verify the base class name against `DefenderEasmManagementTestBase.cs` in the tests directory. Use whatever base class the existing tests inherit from.\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nCurrent README sections are mostly present but need the following fixes:\n\n| Section | Status | Action |\n|---|---|---|\n| Getting started - Install the package | ✅ Present | No change needed |\n| Getting started - Prerequisites | ✅ Present | No change needed |\n| Getting started - Authenticate the client | ⚠️ Link only | Add `DefaultAzureCredential` + `ArmClient` snippet |\n| Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic link only | Add EASM-specific Workspace / Label / Task explanations |\n| ~~Documentation~~ (non-standard) | ❌ Non-standard section | Remove; merge content into Key concepts and Next steps |\n| Examples | ❌ No code snippets | Add snippet-referenced code for create workspace, list workspaces, create label |\n| Troubleshooting | ✅ Present | No change needed |\n| Next steps | ✅ Present | No change needed |\n| Contributing | ✅ Present | No change needed |\n\n### Step 4: Validate\n\nRun these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next.\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 defendereasm` — reads `#region Snippet:` tags from test files and injects the code into README.md placeholder blocks. Check the git diff after running to confirm README was updated correctly.\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 defendereasm` — regenerates public API listing files under `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/api/`. Required if any public types or members were changed.\n5. `dotnet format sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/` — ensures consistent code formatting.\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above.\n","temporary_id":"aw_easm01","title":"[DefenderEasm] Docs: Add service-specific Key Concepts, code examples, and snippet-backed samples to README"},"name":"create_issue"}}}

2026-04-23T08:57:19.7971781Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7971912Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm`
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7972339Z **Service directory:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/`
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7972905Z **Triggered by:** commit 360612179 (#58563) by @azure-sdk
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7973123Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7973233Z ## What Changed
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7973344Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7974327Z A new management-plane SDK for Microsoft Defender External Attack Surface Management (Defender EASM) was added. The package ships two resource types (`EasmWorkspaceResource` and `EasmLabelResource`) and a README was created with placeholder content. This is the first public release (1.0.0-beta.4).
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7975394Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7975474Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7975580Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7976139Z - **Examples section is empty of real code** — only a generic link to `https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` with no EASM-specific code snippets
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7977273Z - **Key concepts section is generic** — only links to general Azure SDK docs; no description of what Workspaces, Labels, or Tasks are in the context of the EASM service
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7978361Z - **Authenticate the client has no code sample** — just links to a quickstart guide, no inline `DefaultAzureCredential` + `ArmClient` snippet
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7979641Z - **No `tests/Samples/` directory** — there are auto-generated samples in `tests/Generated/Samples/`, but no hand-authored snippet-backed samples that can be injected into the README via `Update-Snippets.ps1`
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7980383Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7980590Z <details>

2026-04-23T08:57:19.7989032Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7989366Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7989783Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7989872Z ### Step 1: Modify README.md
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7990029Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7990230Z **File:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/README.md`

2026-04-23T08:57:19.7992254Z

2026-04-23T08:57:19.7993038Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7993111Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7993296Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7993409Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7994387Z **Workspaces** are the top-level container for Defender EASM data. Each workspace is scoped to a subscription and resource group, and contains the discovered attack surface assets and associated metadata for your organization. Use `EasmWorkspaceResource` to create, read, update, and delete workspaces.
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7995452Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7996095Z **Labels** are user-defined tags that can be applied to discovered assets within a workspace to organize and filter them. Use `EasmLabelResource` and `EasmLabelCollection` to manage labels within a workspace.
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7996827Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7997421Z **Tasks** represent long-running operations within a workspace (for example, running a discovery run). Use `GetTaskByWorkspace` on `EasmWorkspaceResource` to poll the status of an ongoing task.
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7998665Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7998795Z ### Thread safety
2026-04-23T08:57:19.7998985Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.8000025Z All client instance methods are thread-safe and independent of each other ([more details](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html#dotnet-service-methods-thread-safety)).
2026-04-23T08:57:19.8001292Z 
2026-04-23T08:57:19.8001446Z ### Additional concepts

2026-04-23T08:57:19.8005037Z [Long-running operations](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#consuming-long-running-operations-using-operationt) |
